data.title: DFDV increased its holdings by 196,141 SOLs, bringing its total holdings to over 2 million.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed DeFi Dev Corp (DFDV) announced on the X platform that it has increased its holdings of SOL by 196,141 at an average price of $202.76. The total SOL treasury holdings now reach 2,027,817. As of September 4, DFDV's SOL and equivalents are worth $427 million.

data.title: Fed Board nominee Milan: Trump's policies are quite disinflationary
data.description: Milan, the nominee for the Federal Reserve Board of Governors, said that Trump's various policies are "quite disinflationary" and no one asked me to commit to voting for a rate cut. (Jinshi)

data.title: ETH Strategy increased its holdings by 233 ETH, bringing its total Ethereum holdings to 12,040.
data.description: Strategic ETH Reserve announced on the X platform that it has increased its holdings by 233 ETH at an average price of $4,480, bringing its total Ethereum holdings to 12,040. The funds used for this increase came from its newly launched Perpetual Note (ESPN).

data.title: Federal Reserve's Williams Anticipates Gradual Rate Cuts Amid Economic Forecasts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Williams has indicated that if the economy aligns with his predictions, interest rates are expected to be gradually reduced. He noted that tariffs could increase inflation by 1.00% to 1.50% this year. The unemployment rate is projected to rise to approximately 4.5% next year. So far, tariffs do not appear to have driven long-term inflation upward. Inflation is expected to be between 3% and 3.25% by 2025.

data.title: ETH falls below 4300 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that ETH has fallen below 4,300 USDT, currently trading at 4,297.85 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 3.8%. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance)

data.title: pump.fun: $12,192,383 worth of PUMP tokens purchased in the past week
data.description: pump.fun posted on the X platform that it has purchased $12,192,383 worth of PUMP tokens in the past week, equivalent to 98.23% of the total revenue from August 28 to September 3. PUMP purchases have now offset 5.363% of the total circulating supply, an increase of 1.102% over the past week.

data.title: A whale withdrew $2.09 million worth of WLFI from CEX 50 minutes ago.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin's monitoring, WLFI continued to fall. "Invested $13.29 million to bet on $BLOCK and $WLFI addresses" withdrew another $2.09 million worth of WLFI from #Bybit 50 minutes ago; currently he holds a total of 62.78 million WLFI, and the average price of the added 52.56 million is $0.2313, with a floating loss of $3.436 million.

data.title: Greeks.live: The market is in a clear decline, and BTC's short-term IV has risen to 40%.
data.description: Adam, a macroeconomic researcher at Greek.live, posted on the X platform that the market is in a clear downturn, with BTC's short- and medium-term IV rising to 40% and ETH's short-term IV to 70%. This increase in short-term IV indicates rising market expectations for volatility this week. The decline in US crypto stocks, particularly those in the MicroStrategy series, is a contributing factor. September has historically been a weak month for capital, and the final quarter will see more abundant capital. Today's put options block trading volume also rose rapidly, totaling $1.17 billion, accounting for 30% of the day's total trading volume, indicating a prevailing defensive mentality.

data.title: New economic data rejects Trump’s 350bps rate cut dream as Bitcoin falls while stocks climb
data.description:
US services inflation stayed elevated in August, complicating expectations for the Federal Reserve as markets look for a September policy adjustment. The likelihood of a small 25bps cut is now increasing, which is likely to anger President Donald Trump, who has advocated for a mammoth 350bps cut. The ISM Services Prices Index registered 69
source: https://cryptoslate.com/insights/new-economic-data-rejects-trumps-350bps-rate-cut-dream-as-bitcoin-falls-while-stocks-climb/

data.title: Tether Mints 2 Billion USDT on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Tether has recently minted 2 billion USDT on the Ethereum blockchain. This development occurred just minutes ago, marking a significant addition to the circulating supply of the stablecoin. Tether's actions are closely monitored by the cryptocurrency community due to their potential impact on market liquidity and stability.

data.title: Federal Reserve Board nominee Stephen Milan: The president has the right to express his views on monetary policy
data.description: Stephen Milan, a nominee for the Federal Reserve Board of Governors, said it is important to hear a variety of views in economics and that the president has the right to express his views on monetary policy.

data.title: Bloomberg: Strategy has met all criteria for inclusion in the S&P 500 index
data.description: Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) currently meets all the criteria for inclusion in the S&P 500 index, including liquidity and market capitalization, due to its approximately $70 billion in Bitcoin holdings and $14 billion in quarterly unrealized profits. If included, approximately 500,000 shares would be purchased by passive funds, with a market capitalization of approximately $16 billion.

data.title: The Jito Foundation has made four updates to the JTO token economics and completed the first round of $1 million JTO buyback.
data.description: The Jito Foundation announced four updates to the JTO token economics in a post on the X platform. These updates include: 1. Completion of the first round of $1 million in JTO buybacks and future plans: $1 million worth of JTO was repurchased in four installments over ten days. The Foundation will continue to utilize the TWAP buyback strategy while developing other mechanisms, such as an auction system, to automatically accumulate JTO value. 2. The JIP-24 proposal was passed, doubling DAO block engine fees. 3. The launch of the JTO Economic Hub. 4. The first JTO holder conference call was held.

data.title: Analysis: Venus attackers are Lazarus hacker group, the cause was a fake Zoom meeting
data.description: EurekaTrading founder Kuan Sun posted on the X platform, recalling how he nearly lost $13 million to a phishing attack. He explained that on September 2, 2025, approximately $13 million in assets in his wallet were nearly stolen by the Lazarus hacker group. The security team responded swiftly and ultimately recovered the funds. The attack stemmed from a seemingly normal Zoom meeting invitation, which turned out to be a carefully crafted phishing trap. The hackers leveraged "semi-acquaintances," deepfake videos, and a forged Rabby plugin to tailor their attacks to the victims' Venus positions. By mistakenly trusting the fake plugin and executing a withdrawal request, the victim's assets were at risk of being transferred with the associated liabilities. PeckShield, SlowMist, Venus, and multiple security teams responded swiftly, suspending the protocol and investigating the risks, ultimately preventing the theft. Hardware wallets aren't foolproof; plugins and front-end hijacking remain a risk. Zoom links, update pop-ups, and even seldom-acquaintances can all serve as entry points for attacks.

data.title: Fed Board nominee Milan: Fed independence is crucial to the economy
data.description: Milan, the nominee for the Federal Reserve Board of Governors, said: "The independence of the Federal Reserve is crucial to the economy. The president nominated me because he shares my policy views. If confirmed, I will act independently." (Jinshi)

data.title: Cumberland withdraws 22,086 ETH from Coinbase Prime
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, 33 minutes ago, market maker Cumberland withdrew 22,086 ETH worth US$96.99 million from the Coinbase Prime hot wallet address.

data.title: Ether.fi user registrations increased by nearly 600% in the past 24 hours
data.description: The official ether.fi account, X, stated that user registrations had increased by nearly 600% in the past 24 hours, putting pressure on the system. The system has now been upgraded and is back to normal operation.

data.title: 833K ETH Trapped in Validator Queue Creates Supply Shortage – $4,500 Breakout Next?
data.description:
Ethereum supply shortage intensifies as 833,141 ETH remain trapped in a 14-day validator staking queue while Fundstrat analysts predict $9,000 ETH by January 2026, citing a resurfacing Wyckoff accumulation pattern that previously drove ETH from $90 to $4,866.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/833k-eth-trapped-in-validator-queue-creates-supply-shortage-4500-breakout-next/
